generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller interfacing with the cart stepper motor for horizontal movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the horizontal movement of the gantry crane's cart component"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller interfacing with the hoist stepper motor for vertical movement of the crane"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the vertical movement of the gantry crane's hoist component"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the hoist's swinging motion angle for trajectory validation and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane stability and operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interfacing with motor controllers (TMC4671-Eval) for crane movement control"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Fusion360CraneFrameModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 model of the crane frame used for structural analysis and simulation"
]

instance Fusion360ComponentsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 models of all crane components (frame, cart, hoist) for CAD-based validation"
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by Trajectory Generator Service to compute optimal paths with minimal residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model implemented in Simulation Service to replicate physical behavior for comparison with real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibModule
]

instance TimeSeriesHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data logged in TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) for historical analysis and validation of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance RealTimeTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory data generated by Trajectory Generator Service for continuous validation against physical behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseMosquitto
]

instance SimulatedTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory data produced by Simulation Service for comparison with real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseMosquitto
]

instance OperationalParameterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operational parameters (position, velocity, acceleration) logged via Python logging application"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonGantryLibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source Python module encapsulating core services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) for gantry crane digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database (TimescaleDB) for storing historical and real-time crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeSeriesHistoricalData, OperationalParameterData
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization system for deploying TimescaleDB, MQTT Broker, and Grafana components with Docker Compose orchestration"
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real-time data exchange between services via message signaling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneStateData, RealTimeTrajectoryData, SimulatedTrajectoryData
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for displaying real-time and simulated trajectory traces with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeTrajectoryData, SimulatedTrajectoryData
]

instance ArduinoInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino Uno platform interfacing with sensors (Swing Angle Encoder, Anemometer) and transmitting data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using kinematic models to generate optimal crane trajectories with minimal residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, TrajectoryOptimizationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing real-time sensor data with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics and alerting operators for threshold breaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides DistanceValidationInsight, OperationalAlertAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service storing time-series data in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalTrendInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing Grafana dashboard visualization of real-time and simulated trajectory traces with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting optimal paths to minimize residual swinging motion during crane operation"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action implementing optimal trajectory recommendations from Trajectory Generator Service"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DistanceValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight calculating distance metrics between real-time sensor data and simulated trajectories for validation"
]

instance OperationalAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action triggering dashboard notifications when operational thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling trend analysis of historical crane operation data for predictive maintenance"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real-time and simulated trajectory visualization with confidence bounds"
]

// C12: Environment
instance CraneLaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotorController, CartMotor,
              HoistMotorController, HoistMotor, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer,
              ArduinoInterface, Fusion360CraneFrameModel, Fusion360ComponentsModel,
              KinematicModel, SimulationModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is implemented through the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which produces optimal movement trajectories based on a kinematic model. These trajectories are sent to the physical system via the **Control Application (Python)**, which directly interfaces with the crane’s controllers. The **Continuous Validation Service** provides feedback to the operator (via dashboard notifications) rather than directly to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a continuous time scale with real-time data logging and validation. The Logging Application continuously logs crane state data, while the Continuous Validation Service operates in near real-time to compare measurements with simulations. The frequency of data updates is not explicitly quantified in the documents, but the system is designed for continuous operation and validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is structured as:
  - **Physical Crane (PT)**: Central hardware component (frame, motors, controllers, sensors).
  - **Physical Crane Interface (Python)**: Acts as a bridge between PT and DT.
  - **Control Application (Python)**: Executes commands from DT to PT.
  - **DT Services (Six Containers)**:
    1. Database (TimescaleDB) – Stores data.
    2. Dashboard (Grafana) – Visualizes data.
    3. Trajectory Generator Service – Computes optimal paths.
    4. Simulation Service – Simulates crane behavior.
    5. Continuous Validation Service – Compares real vs. simulated data.
    6. MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) – Facilitates inter-service communication.
  Orchestration is centralized via Docker Compose for deployment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers the following lifecycle stages of its physical counterpart:
  - **As Designed**: Represented by the **CAD models** (Autodesk Fusion360) and **kinematic models** used for trajectory generation.
  - **As Manufactured**: Represented by the **physical crane hardware** (frame, motors, controllers, Arduino, sensors) and the **Arcadia models** (Capella) for system engineering validation.
  - **As Operated**: Represented by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which validates operational trajectories against simulations during runtime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Kinematic models validated against physical behavior via simulation.
  - **Validation**: Continuous validation compares real-time sensor data with simulations, using distance metrics and threshold-based alerts.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Confidence bounds (visualized in Grafana) account for simulation/model discrepancies.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Time-series classification techniques (e.g., fault detection) identify anomalies in operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin uses the following technical connections:
  - **MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto)**: Facilitates real-time signaling between services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation).
  - **SQL Queries**: Used for accessing TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) to retrieve and log time-series data.
  - **Python APIs**: Core services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) are implemented as Python modules and interact with the physical system via the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted/deployed on:
  - **Single-Personal-Computer Setup**: All services (Python containers, database, MQTT broker, dashboard) run on a single machine via Docker Compose.
  - **First-Time Setup**: Automated initialization of TimescaleDB, Grafana, and MQTT broker via Docker Compose scripts.
  - **Scalability**: Services can be extended by adding new Python modules (gantrylib) or Docker containers."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is **not explicitly detailed** in the documents. No external systems (e.g., other digital twins, enterprise databases) are mentioned for interoperability."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **not explicitly stated** in the documents. The exemplar uses open-source tools (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Mosquitto), implying potential public access to logged data. Privacy is not addressed beyond the open-source license (MIT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar follows **ad-hoc standards**:
  - **Digital Twin Framework**: No commercial or open-source DT framework (e.g., Eclipse Ditto/BaSyx) is used; services are implemented independently.
  - **Protocols**: MQTT for messaging, SQL for database queries.
  - **Models**: CAD (Autodesk Fusion 360) and Capella (Model-Based Systems Engineering) for representation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The document does not provide explicit details on security or safety considerations. The Human Machine Interface (dashboard) allows operators to control the crane, but there is no mention of emergency stop mechanisms, encryption protocols, or cybersecurity measures for remote operation. Future work may address these aspects."
]
